sections.paragraph:
γάμος, ου, ὁ [cp. γαμβρός, assoc. w. Skt., ‘one connected through marriage’, such as ‘son-in-law’, ‘brother-in-law’]

—1. of festivities, including esp. banqueting, connected with entry into a marriage relationship: wedding celebration, marriage feast, wedding sg. and pl. Mt 22:2 al.; ἔνδυμα γ. wedding garment 22:11; with focus on accommodations banquet hall 22:10.

—2. of the marriage relationship as such: marriage Hb 13:4.
